Document:
# Minor Factions
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Minor%20Factions"/]
◈ Minor Factions ◈ Wendover Region ◈
The Wasteland is home to many smaller groups and organizations that operate on the fringes of major faction politics. While they lack the military strength of the NCR or the Brotherhood, their presence shapes the region in ways that cannot be overlooked.
## The Enclave
[bold]The Enclave - Remnants of the United States Government[/bold]
The self-proclaimed continuation of the United States government. The most technologically advanced - and most dangerous - organization in the Wasteland. Operating covertly in the Wendover region to re-establish federal authority through force, science, and absolute conviction in their own supremacy. [bold]→ [textlink="Full Dossier" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/The_Enclave"/][/bold] - Complete history, ideology, and threat assessment.
Each of these groups operates with their own agenda and can become allies, enemies, or uneasy neutrals depending on how the round unfolds.
